tasks.title: Remove Chain 2 setup from EVM e2e test
tasks.description: Remove unnecessary Chain 2 (connected Aptos chain) setup from EVM e2e test. The EVM test only needs Chain 1 (hub) and Chain 3 (EVM).
tasks.details:
There are two e2e test files:
- `testing-infra/e2e-tests-apt/run-tests.sh` - Aptos e2e test (CORRECTLY uses Chain 1 + Chain 2)
- `testing-infra/e2e-tests-evm/run-tests.sh` - EVM e2e test (INCORRECTLY starts Chain 2, should only use Chain 1 + Chain 3)

This task modifies ONLY `testing-infra/e2e-tests-evm/run-tests.sh`. The EVM test currently starts Chain 2 on lines 39-41, but this is unnecessary. The EVM test flow uses:
- Chain 1 (hub): Intent creation and fulfillment
- Chain 3 (EVM): Escrow operations

Chain 2 is not used in the EVM test workflow and should be removed to simplify the test setup.
tasks.testStrategy: Run `./testing-infra/e2e-tests-evm/run-tests.sh` after removing Chain 2 setup and verify it completes successfully with only Chain 1 and Chain 3 running. Verify that `./testing-infra/e2e-tests-apt/run-tests.sh` still works correctly (it should still use Chain 2).

subtasks.title: Remove Chain 2 setup scripts from testing-infra/e2e-tests-evm/run-tests.sh
subtasks.description: Remove lines 39-41 that start Chain 2 (connected Aptos chain) from the EVM e2e test script.
subtasks.details:
Remove these three lines from `testing-infra/e2e-tests-evm/run-tests.sh` (NOT the apt version):
- Line 39: `./testing-infra/chain-connected-apt/setup-chain.sh`
- Line 40: `./testing-infra/chain-connected-apt/setup-alice-bob.sh`
- Line 41: `./testing-infra/chain-connected-apt/deploy-contracts.sh`

Note: Do NOT modify `testing-infra/e2e-tests-apt/run-tests.sh` - that file correctly uses Chain 2.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify the script runs without errors after removing these lines. Confirm that Chain 2 is not started when running the EVM test.

subtasks.title: Verify verifier configuration for EVM test doesn't require Chain 2
subtasks.description: Check that verifier configuration for EVM test only uses Chain 1 and Chain 3.
subtasks.details: Review `testing-infra/chain-connected-evm/configure-verifier.sh` and ensure it doesn't configure Chain 2. The verifier should only monitor Chain 1 (hub) and Chain 3 (EVM). Verify that the verifier config called on line 50 of `testing-infra/e2e-tests-evm/run-tests.sh` doesn't require Chain 2.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run verifier configuration and verify it only sets up Chain 1 and Chain 3. Check that no Chain 2 configuration is attempted.

subtasks.title: Test EVM e2e flow without Chain 2
subtasks.description: Run the complete EVM e2e test to verify it works correctly with only Chain 1 and Chain 3.
subtasks.details:
Execute `./testing-infra/e2e-tests-evm/run-tests.sh` and verify:
- Chain 1 (hub) starts correctly
- Chain 3 (EVM) starts correctly
- Chain 2 is NOT started
- Intent creation on Chain 1 works
- Escrow creation on Chain 3 works
- Verifier monitors Chain 1 and releases escrow on Chain 3
- No Chain 2 errors or dependencies
subtasks.testStrategy: Run the full EVM e2e test suite and verify all steps complete successfully. Confirm that Chain 2 processes are not started during the test.
